descriptionByLocale.it: Reference code: JR128029 Richemont owns some of the world’s leading luxury goods Maisons, with particular strengths in jewellery, fine watches and premium accessories. Each Maison represents a proud tradition of style, quality and craftsmanship and Richemont seeks to preserve the heritage and identity of each of its Maisons. At the same time, we are committed to innovation and designing new products which are in keeping with our Maisons’ values, through a process of continuous creativity. Working as Group Learning & Development Intern, you will have the opportunity to take part in our Group dynamic to enhance our learning experiences, and create a better work environment, supported by a meaningful and mature learning culture. You will help us evolve our beautiful heritage and empower our people and organisation to thrive in a fast-changing environment, empowering our people to grow with us. You will join a dynamic, diverse, and highly passionate team – we can promise there will never be a dull day! HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT? You will find yourself in a dynamic, innovative environment with a strong desire to grow and improve the experience of our employees, providing them the levers to take ownership of their own career development and continue grow with us. You will be part of Group Learning and Development team and your main responsibilities will be: L&D digital ecosystem: Administrative support on digital platforms (LMS, LXP): extracting and analysing learner activity, producing analysis reports on ongoing learning initiatives for evaluation and impact and co-ordinating with our HRIS teams, Digital content curation: selection of relevant content on different topics to support different learning initiatives in collaboration with SMEs from different Functions, Maisons and Regions, Review and update vendor processes as well as administrative access to obtain all learner reports for all Maisons and Regions L&D contacts, liaise with suppliers and stakeholders when needed, Manage bi-annual information sessions for contracted vendors Provide administrative support to various L&D projects run by Group L&D with Central Functions. L&D Community activation: Lead Community engagements on topics of digital platform, learning consumption and prepare your own slides with high quality for such presentations Support the team on global event organization or community engagements HOW WILL YOU EXPERIENCE SUCCESS WITH US? Curious and creative thinker, preferably with an academic qualification Data driven person with analytical mindset Understanding or practice of Instruction Design and Adult Learning pedagogy will be a great asset. Previous experience with a Learning Management System or a Digital leaning tool Basic planning, project management and communication skills Organized & Proactive Fluency in English is mandatory, French is an asset. You are at ease with MS Office. Ability to work as part of cross-functional teams Must be a Serial learner Available for a 6 -month Internship with starting date 15.06.2026 Internship agreement with your school/university mandatory WHAT MAKES OUR GROUP DIFFERENT? Our true power does not lie in our similarities but in the rich diversity of our arts, cultures, and human skills, as well as our specific ability to foster untapped potential. - We value freedom, collegiality, loyalty, and solidarity. - We foster empathy, curiosity, courage, humility, and integrity. - We care for the world we live in. YOUR JOURNEY WITH US If your application is selected, we will reach out to you ASAP for an informal introductory call. The next step from there would be a first interview with our Group L&D Director #Richemont #WeCraftTheFuture Similar Jobs HR Senior Project & Portfolio Manager Save Bellevue, Switzerland Richemont Group Employer Branding and University Relations Intern Save Bellevue, Switzerland Richemont Swiss Learning & Development Intern Save Bellevue, Switzerland Richemont
descriptionByLocale.en: Reference code: JR128334 Surrounded by his family and guided by his strong entrepreneurial mindset, Georges-Edouard Piaget decided, in 1874, to create a watchmaking workshop in La Côte-aux-Fées, a small village in the middle of the Swiss mountains of the Jura. Since that day, Piaget has pushed the limits to “do what has never been done before” and crafts sophisticated and flamboyant watches and jewellery creations. Within the walls of our Ateliers de l’Extraordinaire, our master artisans continue to harness rare skills that have been preserved and perfected from generation to generation. Today, Piaget’s exceptional craftsmanship is celebrated worldwide, supported by a strong global presence and a dedicated network of client support and retail colleagues who bring the spirit of our Maison to life every day. HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT? At its Geneva Headquarters, Piaget is seeking a full-time intern who’s a strong communicator, a team player and who has a retail-driven mind, to join its team. As part of the International Commercial Department and reporting to the Head of Retail and Partner Retail Excellence, you will be supporting Boutique activations and client experience initiatives as well as Retail operations and performance across internal Boutiques, partner Boutiques and wholesalers. This is an exceptional opportunity to gain hands-on experience and contribute to key initiatives within a dynamic environment. Internship duration: 10 months, starting September 1st, 2026. To be considered for this role, please submit a cover letter and a resume. Key responsibilities : Preparing presentations for various stakeholders in HQ and Markets using your MS PowerPoint proficiency Being involved in client experience projects, including monitoring client satisfaction and engagement, assisting in the creation of in-store activations, and the deployment of digital tools in boutiques Engaging in retail operations to support boutiques and subsidiaries with policies, new tools and services, as well as transversal projects related to After-Sales, Visual Merchandising, CRM, and Boutique openings. Leading the preparation and coordination of partner meeting bookings during Watch and Wonders 2027. Proactively running comprehensive data analysis of Retail Metrics in MS Excel and dedicated dashboards. Supporting the Retail & Partner Retail Excellence team in preparing their monthly calls with all subsidiaries and counterparts worldwide. Proactively creating content to animate the Retail & CRM global community through various communication channels (Intranet, monthly newsletters, SharePoint, …). HOW WILL YOU EXPERIENCE SUCCESS WITH US? You are currently attending or have just finished a Business Master’s Degree or equivalent. You are a critical thinker who loves to evaluate information, make informed decisions, and develop innovative solutions. You have a minimum of two previous experiences in retail and/or wholesale, either in a boutique or a head office. You have previous experience in creating engaging presentations. You have previous experiences in collaborating with cross-functional teams, communicating effectively with stakeholders, presenting results, and driving implementation. You have previous experience with KPI dashboards and reporting tools such as knowledge of SAP Analytics Cloud or Google Looker. Knowledge of Salesforce Service/Marketing cloud would be a plus. You have strong presentation skills and proven proficiency in MS PowerPoint. You are experienced with analyzing and visualizing large volumes of data in MS Excel. You have excellent verbal and written communication skills in English; any other language would be a plus. You are autonomous and have very strong attention to details. You are proactive, ambitious, and not afraid of growing with challenges. STILL WONDERING WHY YOU SHOULD APPLY? A Welcoming Team: Join our friendly, open-minded, and talented team, where your skills will be valued and your contributions will make a real difference. Dynamic and Engaging Work: Experience daily activities that are interesting, challenging, and diverse, keeping you engaged and motivated. Investment in Your Growth: We are passionate about developing our people, and you will have access to various training and development opportunities to enhance your skills and advance your career. The Piaget culture of encouraging Extra-Care, fostering Mastery and bringing out the Extraordinary in our people, means that we will always go further, doing “what has never been done before”. Together. If you want to become a part of it do not hesitate to apply! descriptionByLocale.de:
Referenzcode: JR128029 Richemont besitzt einige der weltweit führenden Luxusartikel Maisons, mit besonderen Stärken in Schmuck, edlen Uhren und Premium-Accessoires. Jedes Maison ist eine stolze Tradition von Stil, Qualität und Handwerk und Richemont versucht, das Erbe und die Identität jedes seiner Maisons zu bewahren. Gleichzeitig setzen wir uns für die Innovation und die Entwicklung neuer Produkte ein, die den Werten unserer Maisons entsprechen, durch einen Prozess der kontinuierlichen Kreativität. Als Group Learning & Development Intern haben Sie die Möglichkeit, an unserer Gruppendynamik teilzunehmen, um unsere Lernerfahrungen zu verbessern und ein besseres Arbeitsumfeld zu schaffen, das von einer sinnvollen und reifen Lernkultur unterstützt wird. Sie werden uns dabei helfen, unser schönes Erbe zu entwickeln und unser Volk und unsere Organisation zu befähigen, in einer sich schnell verändernden Umgebung zu leben und unsere Menschen dazu zu befähigen, mit uns zu wachsen. Sie werden sich einem dynamischen, vielfältigen und leidenschaftlichen Team anschließen – wir können versprechen, dass es nie ein langweiliger Tag wird! Wie wär's, wenn du einen IMPACT machst? Sie finden sich in einem dynamischen, innovativen Umfeld mit einem starken Wunsch, die Erfahrung unserer Mitarbeiter zu wachsen und zu verbessern, ihnen die Hebel zu geben, um sich an ihre eigene Karriereentwicklung zu beteiligen und mit uns weiter zu wachsen. Sie werden Teil des Group Learning and Development Teams sein und
• Ihre Hauptaufgaben sind: L&D-Digital-Ökosystem: Administrative Unterstützung auf digitalen Plattformen (LMS, LXP): Extraktion und Analyse von Lernaktivitäten, Erstellung von Analyseberichten über laufende Lerninitiativen für die Bewertung und Auswirkungen und Koordinierung mit unseren HRIS-Teams, Digital Content Curation: Auswahl relevanter Inhalte zu verschiedenen Themen, um verschiedene Lerninitiativen in Zusammenarbeit mit KMU aus verschiedenen administrativen Bereichen zu unterstützen L&D Community-Aktivierung: Führen Sie Community-Verlobungen zu Themen der digitalen Plattform, lernen Konsum und bereiten Sie Ihre eigenen Dias mit hoher Qualität für solche Präsentationen Unterstützt das Team auf globaler Veranstaltungsorganisation oder Community-Verlobungen HOW WILL YOU EXPERIENCE SUCCESS MIT US? Curious und kreative Denker, vorzugsweise mit einer akademischen Qualifikation Datengetriebene Person mit analytischem Verstand Verständnis oder Praxis der Instruction Design und Adult Learning Pädagogik wird ein großer Vorteil sein. Vorherige Erfahrungen mit einem Learning Management System oder einem digitalen Magering-Tool Basisplanung, Projektmanagement und Kommunikationsfähigkeit Organisiert & Proactive Fluency in Englisch ist obligatorisch, Französisch ist ein Asset. Sie sind mit MS Office ganz einfach. Fähigkeit, im Rahmen von funktionsübergreifenden Teams zu arbeiten Muss ein serialer Lernender für ein 6 -Monats Praktikum mit Startdatum 15.06.2026 Praktikumsvertrag mit Ihrer Schule/Universität verpflichtend WAS MAKES OUR GROUP DIFFERENT? Unsere wahre Macht liegt nicht in unserer Ähnlichkeit, sondern in der reichen Vielfalt unserer Kunst, Kulturen und menschlichen Fähigkeiten sowie unserer spezifischen Fähigkeit, ungenutztes Potenzial zu fördern. Wir schätzen Freiheit, Kollegalität, Loyalität und Solidarität. - Ja. Wir fördern Empathie, Neugier, Mut, Demut und Integrität. - Ja. Wir kümmern uns um die Welt, in der wir leben. Wenn Ihre Bewerbung ausgewählt wird, werden wir Sie nach einem informellen Einführungsgespräch zum ASAP erreichen. Der nächste Schritt von dort wäre ein erstes Interview mit unserem Group L&D Director #Richemont #WeCraftTheFuture Similar Jobs HR Senior Project & Portfolio Manager Save Bellevue, Switzerland Richemont Group Employer Branding and University Relations Intern Save Bellevue, Schweiz Richemont Swiss Learning & Development Intern Save Bellevue, Schweiz Richemont
